cost_components_summary: Reduced-form child role cost excluding explicitly listed inputs and excluding policy carbon costs.
input_basis_notes: Conventional clinker owns calcination process emissions and consumes host-specific kiln heat from the kiln heat child.

rollout_limit_notes: Indicative decomposition pilot envelope only. Child activity propagation is refined in the linked-parent activity issue.

derivation_method: Reduced-form decomposition of aggregate cement-equivalent pathway rows into clinker kiln heat and finishing children.

candidate_expansion_pathway: Expand to plant-level clinker kiln grinding blending and capture modules with explicit material balances.
